revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-3-140

A plan-position indicator in which the true north on the display remains fixed in spite of the movement of the ship.


Note: The term is extended to stabilisation with respect to magnetic north.

Reference: B.S. (modified)

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Azimuth-stabilised P.P.I.}}
